name: construction contractors managing 5-15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 projects/month, inadequate OSHA compliance checklists cause potential fines and safety hazards. We automate checklist preparation instead of manual checklist creation and outdated templates.
problem_solved: Ensuring OSHA compliance during site inspections
